title: Capture full build logs, exit codes, and compute SHA256s of native_posix BLE artifacts
description: After successful build, record all commands, stdout/stderr to log file, compute sha256sum of zephyr.elf, zephyr.bin, and other key artifacts. Generate provenance report.
close_reason: Implemented provenance capture in build matrix, fixed board.yml schema to unblock native_sim, resolved Kconfig loop triggers in BLE test prj.conf, verified with full logs/exit codes/SHA256s in provenance report. Build now captures all required artifacts for native_posix BLE.
